## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence. Be specific. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New profile
- [ ] Improvement to existing profile
- [ ] Fix (typo, formatting, outdated info)
- [ ] Free resources addition
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / automation

## Checklist

- [ ] I am a human contributor (not an automated bot submission)
- [ ] I tested this profile with at least one AI tool
- [ ] The profile includes the required header (Name, Works with, Best for, Extends, Version)
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing profile
- [ ] Follows formatting rules in `profiles/universal.md`
- [ ] No em dashes or smart quotes
- [ ] Free resource entries have a verified free tier with a date (if applicable)
- [ ] For translations: files placed in `profiles/lang/` and branch named `translation/lang-profilename`
